llm_judge.reasoning: The predicted workflow is completely empty and bears no relationship to the ground truth diabetes treatment algorithm. It defines only a single integer input variable 'x' instead of the many clinical variables required (symptoms_and_new_a1c_gt_58, admission_required, cvd_known_or_risk, metformin_tolerated, various A1C measurements after different treatments, BMI, dual_agent_choice, etc.). The workflow has no decision tree structure at all (empty tree) and produces only a single generic 'Unknown' output instead of the 12 specific clinical outcomes in the ground truth. There are no decision nodes to evaluate logical consistency, and no subworkflows to score (neutral 5). This appears to be either a placeholder or a completely incorrect submission that does not attempt to model the diabetes treatment algorithm.
